args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%maginnis%'
  AND lower(title) LIKE '%street%hype%';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%maginnis%'
  AND lower(title) LIKE '%street%hype%';

args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%maginnis%'
  AND (lower(title) LIKE '%street%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%hype%')
LIMIT 200;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%maginnis%'
  AND (lower(title) LIKE '%street%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%hype%')
LIMIT 200;

args.query:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%'
   OR (lower(title) LIKE '%street%' AND lower(title) LIKE '%hype%')
LIMIT 200;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT track_id, source_id, source_track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language
FROM tracks
WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%'
   OR (lower(title) LIKE '%street%' AND lower(title) LIKE '%hype%')
LIMIT 200;

args.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM sales;

exec_args.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM sales;

args.query:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue
FROM sales
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue
FROM sales
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

args.query:
SELECT s.track_id, SUM(s.revenue_usd) AS revenue
FROM sales s
GROUP BY s.track_id
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 50;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT s.track_id, SUM(s.revenue_usd) AS revenue
FROM sales s
GROUP BY s.track_id
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 50;

args.query: SELECT DISTINCT store FROM sales ORDER BY store;

args.query: SELECT DISTINCT country FROM sales ORDER BY country;

exec_args.sql: SELECT DISTINCT country FROM sales ORDER BY country;

args.query:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd
FROM sales
WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 13758, 14080)
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS revenue_usd
FROM sales
WHERE track_id IN (4122, 4628, 13758, 14080)
GROUP BY store
ORDER BY revenue_usd DESC;
